name: Black Pepper Angel Hair with Smoked Salmon
recipeIngredient: Black pepper angel hair pasta - 16 ounces
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. In a large saucepan, reduce the heavy cream over low heat until it is reduced to half its original volume.
2. In a separate pot, combine clam juice, wine, garlic, peppercorns, salt, dillweed, and vinegar. Reduce to half its original volume, then strain and discard solids.
3. Add strained liquid back to the reduced heavy cream and stir well.
4. Whip 8 ounces of heavy cream until medium peaks form, then add sour cream and whisk until blended.
5. Bring pasta (fresh or dry) to a boil in salted water, cook for 45 seconds (or desired doneness), then drain in a colander.
6. In a sauté pan, heat the sauce over low heat until hot, then stir in grated parmesan until well combined.
7. Add cooked pasta to the sauce and toss to coat evenly.
8. Divide among 4 dishes, top with 2 ounces smoked salmon, a dollop of creme fraiche, and a sprig of dill.
Serves: 4
